title: lolium perenne subsp. compositum
intro: Lolium perenne subsp. compositum, also known as perennial ryegrass, is a subspecies of Lolium perenne that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lolium perenne subsp. compositum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential and confirm its safety for human use.
